purpose: Refute false-positive UI approval by checking that real growth remains understandable on short mobile viewports, not merely present in source code.

source.observedFailure: The first short viewport devoted most visible space to the organism while unlock, abilities and next evolution appeared substantially lower in the page.

alternatives.reason: Exact strings can exist in JSX while remaining below the useful viewport, clipped, unreadable or disconnected from runtime evidence.
Preserves the semantic contract and adds a short-height layout gate without hiding evidence or changing model claims.

pipelineImprovement.problem: Pixel regression and source-string checks can both pass while first-viewport comprehension fails.
pipelineImprovement.change: Add a compact-height CSS contract and deterministic regression tests to the normal Vitest suite.
pipelineImprovement.expectedCost: No new CI service or dependency; milliseconds inside existing tests.
rollback: remove this manifest and the adversarial test
